titleStmt.title: SII 26.332: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 332. (A.R. No. 314 of 1909.) TIRUKKACHCHŪR, CHINGLEPUT TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription is interesting as it refers to the gifts of lamp made during the reign-periods of three or four earlier kings.

It states that an extent of 525 kuḻi of land and a well which were granted formerly for burning a nandā lamp in the temple of Tiruvālakkōyiluḍaiyanāyaṉār of Tirukkachchūr by a certain Kirandai Amarkaṇāyakaṉ Kākkunāyakar and his younger brother Tiruvālakkōyiluḍaiyaṉ in the 20th year of the reign of Kulōttuṅgaśōḻadēva (see No. 291 above), were sold back to Kirandai Arumaṇināyakar, one of the sons of the above-mentioned donor, for a sum of 12 Paḻaṅkāśu, 1260 Naṟkāśu and 32 paṇam, by the following Śivabrāhmanas in the manner detailed below. Tillaikkūtta-bhaṭṭaṉ received 5 Paḻaṅkāśu in the 38th year of Tribhuvaṉavīradēva for (1/4) lamp, Śrikaṇṭha-bhaṭṭaṉ and others received 7 Paḻaṅkāśu in the 15th year of Irāśarāśadēva for (1/4) lamp, Dēvargaḷ-Dēvaṉ Sundaraṉ alias Nāṟpatteṇṇāyira-bhaṭṭaṉ received 1,260 Naṟkāśu in the 27th year of Irāśarāśadēvar for 1/4 lamp, Sundara-bhaṭṭaṉ Mādēva-bhaṭṭaṉ and others received 12 paṇam in the 7th year of Sundarapāṇḍyadēvar for [. .] lamp, Tiruchchiṟṟambala-bhaṭṭaṉ Bhīmaṉ alias Panmākēśura-bhaṭṭaṉ received 11 paṇam, for 1 mā araiyē-araikkāṇi mumdirigai lamp, Tiruvagatti-bhaṭṭaṉ received 3 paṇam for 1/2 lamp, Nāṟpatteṇṇāyira-bhaṭṭaṉ and others received 3 paṇam for kāṇi-araikkāṇi mundrigai lamp, and Sādāśiva-bhaṭṭaṉ and others received 3 paṇam for kāṇiaraikkāṇi lamp. It is stated that all these Śivabrāhmaṇas had agreed to burn the nandā lamp accordingly.

It is interesting to note that the record of the 20th year of Kulōttuṅgaśōḻadēva containing the original grant of land, is stated to be engraved on the northern side of the maṇḍapa which it described as pā-kal maṇḍapa (i.e. one, built of larger dressed stone slabs).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śvastiśrī . koṟcaṭapaṉmarāṉa tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīcuntarapāṇṭiya tevarkku yāṇṭu 10 5 vatu tirukkaccūr Uṭaiyār tiruvālakkoyiluṭaiya
nāyaṉārkku muṉṉāḷil kulottuṅkacoḻatevarkku 2 10vatu nāḷil Ivvūr kirantai Amarkaṇāyakaṉ kākkunāyakarum Ivar tampi tiruvālakkoyiluṭaiya na
nāyaṉārkku cantirātittavarai celvatāka vaitta tirununtā viḷakku Oṉṟukku pākal maṇṭapattil vaṭapāriṣattil kalveṭṭuppaṭi Ivarkaḷ kāṇiyil vi
ppulam taṭi Iraṇṭiṉāl kuḻi 3 100 5 10 2m vaṇṇakkaṉ kuṇṭil kuḻi 100 2 10 vaṭa muṉaiyil ceṭṭikkuṟaik kuṇṭil kuḻi 5 10 3m Ç kuḻi muppatiṉaṟu cāṇkolāl
52 10 5m paṭṭippulattil kiḻatalaiyil kiṇaṟu Oṉṟu Ikkoyil kāṇi Uṭaiya civabrāmaṇar Ivarkaḷ piḷḷaikaḷil kirantai Arumaṇi nāyakarukku vi
ṟṟukkuṭuttu cantirātittavaraiyum Upaiyamāka kaikkoṇṭa tiripuvaṉaviratevarkku muppatteṭṭāvatu nāḷil tillaik kūttapaṭṭaṉ kaikkoṇṭa pa[ḻa*ṅ]
kācu 5kku kaikkoṇṭa viḷakku kālum Irācairācatevarku patiṉaiñcāvatu nāḷil śrīkaṇṭapaṭṭaṉ Uḷḷiṭṭār kaikkoṇṭa paḻaṅkācu Eḻukkuk kaik
koṇṭa viḷakku kālum Irācairācatevarkku IruDamaged.patteḻāvatu nāḷil tevarkaḷ cuntaraṉāṉa nāṟpatteṇṇāyirapaṭṭaṉ kaikkoṇṭa naṟkācu Āyirat
tu Irunūṟṟu Aṟupatukku kaikkoṇṭa viḷakku kālum cuntarapāṇṭiyatevarkku Eḻāvatunāḷil cuntarapaṭṭaṉ mātevapaṭṭaṉ
Uḷḷiṭṭār paṇam 10 2kku kaikkoṇṭa viḷakku IDamaged. tirucciṟṟampalapaṭṭaṉ vimaṉāṉa paṉmākecurapaṭṭaṉ paṇam 10 1kkuk kaikkoṇṭa viḷakku Oru Araiye Araikkā
ṇi muntirikaiyum tiruvakattipaṭṭaṉ paṇam 3kkuk kaikkoṇṭa viḷakku Araiyum nāṟpatteṇṇāyirapaṭṭaṉ Uḷḷiṭṭār paṇam 3kkuk kaikkoṇṭa viḷakku kāṇi Arai
kkāṇi muntirikaiyum catācivapaṭṭaṉ Uḷḷiṭṭār paṇam 3kkuk kaikkoṇṭa viḷakku kāṇi Araikkāṇiyum Ākap paḻaṅkācu 10 2kkum naṟkācu 1000 2 100 6 10
kkum paṇam 3 10 2kkum Ikkuḻi 5 100 2 10 5m kiṇaṟum Ivarkku vilaikkuṟa viṟṟup poruḷaṟak kaikkoṇṭu kāṇiyum viṟṟuk kuṭuttu tirumalaiyile cilālekai paṇṇi
kkuṭuppomāka nāṅkaḷ paṇṇikkuṭutta cātaṉappaṭikku Eṅkaḷperile tirivu Iṭṭukkoṇṭu tirununtāviḷakku Oṉṟum cantirātittavaraikkuṅ koḷvatāka Upai
yamāka kaikkoṇṭu cilālekai paṇṇik kuṭuttom civappirāmaṇar Ivvaṉaivom Itu śrīmāheśvararakṣa §
Digital edition of SII 26.332 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
